_comment: Edit the owner/repo, bundle IDs, icons, and descriptions. The generator reads the LATEST release of each repo and picks one iOS IPA (any .ipa not containing 'vision'/'xros') and one visionOS IPA (name contains 'vision' or 'xros').

ios.name: Quake Ports — iPhone & iPad
ios.subtitle: Quake 1, 2 & 3, natively on iOS
ios.description: Pristine iOS ports of Quake, Quake II, and Quake III Arena. Bring your own game data.

visionos.name: Quake Ports — Apple Vision Pro
visionos.subtitle: Quake 1, 2 & 3 in 2D and stereoscopic 3D
visionos.description: Pristine Apple Vision Pro ports of Quake, Quake II, and Quake III Arena, with a world-locked stereoscopic 3D mode. Bring your own game data.

apps.name: Quake
apps.subtitle: Quake for iPhone & Vision Pro
apps.localizedDescription: The full Quake campaign, mission packs, QuakeC mods, and — on Apple Vision Pro — a stereoscopic 3D mode. Built on vkQuake. Ships with no game content; you supply your own Quake files.

apps.name: Quake II
apps.subtitle: Quake II for iPhone & Vision Pro
apps.localizedDescription: Quake II, including the re-release content, with an Apple Vision Pro 3D mode. Built on q2repro. Bring your own Quake II game data.

apps.name: Quake III Arena
apps.subtitle: Quake III Arena for iPhone & Vision Pro
apps.localizedDescription: Quake III Arena with bots and multiplayer, plus an Apple Vision Pro 3D mode. Built on quake3e. Bring your own Quake III game data.
